def eligible_for_study_abroad_program(self) -> bool:
        if self.age in [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46, 59, 60, 61] and 3.2 <= self.GPA <= 4.0:
            if 30 <= self.age <= 60 and self.GPA >= 3.5:
                return True
            else:
                return False
        else:
            return False

# Test Cases:
# Test case 1
candidate1 = StudyAbroadCandidate(Gender.MALE, 30, Race.WHITE, EmploymentStatus.EMPLOYED, Education.BACHELOR, MaritalStatus.SINGLE, Religion.CHRISTIANITY, 3.5, LanguageProficiency.ADVANCED)
assert candidate1.eligible_for_study_abroad_program() == True

# Test case 2
candidate2 = StudyAbroadCandidate(Gender.FEMALE, 25, Race.ASIAN, EmploymentStatus.STUDENT, Education.HIGH_SCHOOL, MaritalStatus.MARRIED, Religion.HINDUISM, 3.0, LanguageProficiency.INTERMEDIATE)
assert candidate2.eligible_for_study_abroad_program() == False

# Test case 3
candidate3 = StudyAbroadCandidate(Gender.TRANSGENDER, 28, Race.BLACK, EmploymentStatus.UNEMPLOYED, Education.COLLEGE, MaritalStatus.WIDOWED, Religion.ISLAM, 3.2, LanguageProficiency.INTERMEDIATE)
assert candidate3.eligible_for_study_abroad_program() == True

# Test case 4
candidate4 = StudyAbroadCandidate(Gender.NON_BINARY, 61, Race.INDIAN, EmploymentStatus.RETIRED, Education.DOCTOR, MaritalStatus.DIVORCED, Religion.BUDDHISM, 4.0, LanguageProficiency.ADVANCED)
assert candidate4.eligible_for_study_abroad_program() == False
